majorIds.Altruism: Nearby players gain 100% of the health you gain from Health Regen and Life Steal.

before.lore: I am thou... Thou art I.

majorIds.Altruism: Allies within 16 blocks gain 100% of the health you gain from Health Regen and Life Steal.

after.lore: I am thou... Thou art I.

majorIds.Grand Influence: While above 80% maximum health, nearby allies gain 15% increased health gain from all sources and 25% Walk Speed.

before.lore: The unwieldy, yet imposing stature of this massive sickle strikes awe into those who view it. Those who have the will to wield it, however, seem to garner respect from all those around them, as though they had become a god.

majorIds.Grand Influence: While above 80% maximum health, allies within 12 blocks gain 15% increased health gain from all sources and 25% Walk Speed.

after.lore: The unwieldy, yet imposing stature of this massive sickle strikes awe into those who view it. Those who have the will to wield it, however, seem to garner respect from all those around them, as though they had become a god.

majorIds.Altruism: Nearby players gain 100% of the health you gain from Health Regen and Life Steal.
Allies within 16 blocks gain 100% of the health you gain from Health Regen and Life Steal.

majorIds.Saviour's Sacrifice: While under 50% maximum health, nearby allies gain 15% bonus damage and defence.

before.lore: Enigmatically, this weapon will only show itself to those who believe themselves to be worth nothing, or to be weak. While utilizing this weapon will greatly strengthen one's resolve, it will disappear when it is no longer needed, going to the next wielder.

majorIds.Saviour's Sacrifice: While under 50% maximum health, allies within 8 blocks gain 15% bonus damage and defence.

after.lore: Enigmatically, this weapon will only show itself to those who believe themselves to be worth nothing, or to be weak. While utilizing this weapon will greatly strengthen one's resolve, it will disappear when it is no longer needed, going to the next wielder.

majorIds.Altruism: Nearby players gain 100% of the health you gain from Health Regen and Life Steal.

before.lore: Childhood memories, days of late nights and snow fights and cocoa by the fireside. Loving smiles and friendly faces. The beating heart of the world: home. This is what you fight for, beating back those dark and wicked forces which work to break down all that is loved. There is no sacrifice too great for the hearth.

majorIds.Altruism: Allies within 16 blocks gain 100% of the health you gain from Health Regen and Life Steal.

after.lore: Childhood memories, days of late nights and snow fights and cocoa by the fireside. Loving smiles and friendly faces. The beating heart of the world: home. This is what you fight for, beating back those dark and wicked forces which work to break down all that is loved. There is no sacrifice too great for the hearth.

majorIds.Old Spark: Whirlwind transforms into a travelling projectile, exploding on contact and knocking enemies into the air. Hold shift to rise with them.

majorIds.Saviour's Sacrifice: While under 50% maximum health, nearby allies gain 15% bonus damage and defence.

before.lore: The last stand, a hero's rally, a turning tide-is it a tale of a champion who conquered, or a martyr who inspired? This is your story to tell.

majorIds.Saviour's Sacrifice: While under 50% maximum health, allies within 8 blocks gain 15% bonus damage and defence.

after.lore: The last stand, a hero's rally, a turning tide-is it a tale of a champion who conquered, or a martyr who inspired? This is your story to tell.

majorIds.Totemic Fuse: Totemic Smash deals +40%, +90%, +90%, and +60% at the cost of half of Totem's duration.
Totemic Smash deals +150%, +150%, +150%, and +120% but totemic smash loses 30% radius.

majorIds.Pioneer's Echo: Phantom Ray deals two bursts of  150%,  60% over 1 second. Decimator's increase and cap are raised to 140% and Quick Draw's activation threshold is decreased to 2.

before.lore: It is an apathy born from lonely desperation with which one sends a blinding ray as their signal flare, uncaring if it hails friend or foe.

majorIds.Pioneer's Echo: Phantom Ray deals 7x damage, but only hits twice over 1 second. Decimator's increase and cap are raised to 140% and Quick Draw's activation threshold is decreased to 2.

after.lore: It is an apathy born from lonely desperation with which one sends a blinding ray as their signal flare, uncaring if it hails friend or foe.
